# fuzzymatch — github.com/axonops/fuzzymatch

A pure-Go library for fuzzy string matching: 23 string-similarity
algorithms, a weighted Scorer, a collection-scan sub-package, and a
one-to-many Extract API. Stdlib-only with one curated runtime dep
(golang.org/x/text for Unicode normalisation). Apache-2.0. Go 1.26+.
No cgo.

## Status

Pre-release. The API is not stable until v1.0.0. The library ships
all 23 algorithm functions, a weighted composite Scorer with
DefaultScorer + DefaultScorerOptions, the Validate input-quality
diagnostics surface, and the scan / Extract APIs at v1.0.0.

## Public API (root package: fuzzymatch)

### AlgoID dispatch enum

- type AlgoID int
- func (AlgoID) String() string
- func AlgoIDs() []AlgoID
- const AlgoLevenshtein AlgoID
- const AlgoDamerauLevenshteinOSA AlgoID
- const AlgoDamerauLevenshteinFull AlgoID
- const AlgoHamming AlgoID
- const AlgoJaro AlgoID
- const AlgoJaroWinkler AlgoID
- const AlgoStrcmp95 AlgoID
- const AlgoSmithWatermanGotoh AlgoID
- const AlgoLCSStr AlgoID
- const AlgoQGramJaccard AlgoID
- const AlgoSorensenDice AlgoID
- const AlgoCosine AlgoID
- const AlgoTversky AlgoID
- const AlgoMongeElkan AlgoID
- const AlgoTokenSortRatio AlgoID
- const AlgoTokenSetRatio AlgoID
- const AlgoPartialRatio AlgoID
- const AlgoTokenJaccard AlgoID
- const AlgoSoundex AlgoID
- const AlgoDoubleMetaphone AlgoID
- const AlgoNYSIIS AlgoID
- const AlgoMRA AlgoID
- const AlgoRatcliffObershelp AlgoID

### Levenshtein edit-distance similarity

- func LevenshteinDistance(a, b string) int
- func LevenshteinDistanceRunes(a, b string) int
- func LevenshteinScore(a, b string) float64
- func LevenshteinScoreRunes(a, b string) float64

### Damerau-Levenshtein OSA similarity

- func DamerauLevenshteinOSADistance(a, b string) int
- func DamerauLevenshteinOSADistanceRunes(a, b string) int
- func DamerauLevenshteinOSAScore(a, b string) float64
- func DamerauLevenshteinOSAScoreRunes(a, b string) float64

### Damerau-Levenshtein Full similarity (Lowrance-Wagner 1975 — true metric)

- func DamerauLevenshteinFullDistance(a, b string) int
- func DamerauLevenshteinFullDistanceRunes(a, b string) int
- func DamerauLevenshteinFullScore(a, b string) float64
- func DamerauLevenshteinFullScoreRunes(a, b string) float64

### Hamming distance similarity

Silent-max policy on unequal-length input (Phase 8.5 Q1 LOCKED):
HammingDistance / HammingDistanceRunes return max(len(a), len(b));
HammingScore / HammingScoreRunes return 0.0. No error, no panic.
Consumers wanting an explicit signal call fuzzymatch.Validate(a, b)
and check for WarnUnequalLength scoped to AlgoHamming.

- func HammingDistance(a, b string) int
- func HammingDistanceRunes(a, b string) int
- func HammingScore(a, b string) float64
- func HammingScoreRunes(a, b string) float64

### Jaro similarity

- func JaroScore(a, b string) float64
- func JaroScoreRunes(a, b string) float64

### Jaro-Winkler similarity

- func JaroWinklerScore(a, b string) float64
- func JaroWinklerScoreRunes(a, b string) float64

### Strcmp95 (Winkler 1994) similarity

- func Strcmp95Score(a, b string) float64

### Smith-Waterman-Gotoh local-alignment similarity

- type SWGParams struct
- func NewSWGParams() SWGParams
- func SmithWatermanGotohScore(a, b string) float64
- func SmithWatermanGotohScoreRunes(a, b string) float64
- func SmithWatermanGotohScoreWithParams(a, b string, params SWGParams) float64
- func SmithWatermanGotohRawScore(a, b string) float64
- func SmithWatermanGotohRawScoreRunes(a, b string) float64
- func SmithWatermanGotohRawScoreWithParams(a, b string, params SWGParams) float64

### Longest Common Substring (LCSStr) similarity

- func LongestCommonSubstring(a, b string) string
- func LongestCommonSubstringRunes(a, b string) string
- func LCSStrScore(a, b string) float64
- func LCSStrScoreRunes(a, b string) float64

### Ratcliff-Obershelp (Dr. Dobb's 1988) gestalt-pattern-matching similarity

- func RatcliffObershelpScore(a, b string) float64
- func RatcliffObershelpScoreRunes(a, b string) float64

### Q-Gram Jaccard (Ukkonen 1992) similarity

- func QGramJaccardScore(a, b string, n int) float64
- func QGramJaccardScoreRunes(a, b string, n int) float64

### Sørensen-Dice (Dice 1945; Sørensen 1948) similarity

- func SorensenDiceScore(a, b string, n int) float64
- func SorensenDiceScoreRunes(a, b string, n int) float64

### Cosine n-gram (Salton & McGill 1983) similarity

- func CosineScore(a, b string, n int) float64
- func CosineScoreRunes(a, b string, n int) float64

### Tversky asymmetric similarity (Tversky 1977)

- func TverskyScore(a, b string, n int, alpha, beta float64) float64
- func TverskyScoreRunes(a, b string, n int, alpha, beta float64) float64

### TokenSortRatio (RapidFuzz Indel formula via Tokenise → sort → join)

- func TokenSortRatioScore(a, b string) float64

### TokenSetRatio (RapidFuzz three-way Indel max with bug-for-bug empty-set deviation)

- func TokenSetRatioScore(a, b string) float64

### PartialRatio (RapidFuzz sliding-window with three-region iteration + char-set early-skip)

- func PartialRatioScore(a, b string) float64

### TokenJaccard (Jaccard 1912 set-Jaccard over Tokenise output — distinct from Q-Gram Jaccard multiset)

- func TokenJaccardScore(a, b string) float64

### Monge-Elkan (Monge & Elkan 1996) per-token-max with pluggable inner metric

MongeElkanScore is the SYMMETRIC default (arithmetic mean of the two
directional scores; invariant under argument swap) — Phase 8.5 Q3
rename. MongeElkanScoreAsymmetric is the directional variant. The
inert NormalisationOptions parameter was removed from both surfaces
in Phase 8.5 Q3.

- func MongeElkanScore(a, b string, inner AlgoID) float64
- func MongeElkanScoreAsymmetric(a, b string, inner AlgoID) float64

### Soundex (Russell 1918 / Knuth TAOCP §6.4) — Knuth/Census variant

- func SoundexCode(s string) string
- func SoundexScore(a, b string) float64

### Double Metaphone (Philips 2000)

- func DoubleMetaphoneKeys(s string) (primary, secondary string)
- func DoubleMetaphoneScore(a, b string) float64

### NYSIIS (Taft 1970 / Knuth TAOCP §6.4)

- func NYSIISCode(s string) string
- func NYSIISScore(a, b string) float64

### MRA (Moore 1977 / NBS Tech Note 943)

- func MRACode(s string) string
- func MRACompare(a, b string) (matched bool, simScore int)
- func MRAScore(a, b string) float64

### Normalisation

- type NormalisationOptions struct
- func DefaultNormalisationOptions() NormalisationOptions
- func Normalise(s string, opts NormalisationOptions) string

### Tokenisation

- type TokeniseOptions struct
- func DefaultTokeniseOptions() TokeniseOptions
- func Tokenise(s string, opts TokeniseOptions) []string

### Scorer construction and options

- type Scorer struct
- func NewScorer(opts ...ScorerOption) (*Scorer, error)
- func DefaultScorer() *Scorer
- func DefaultScorerOptions() []ScorerOption
- func (s *Scorer) Score(a, b string) float64
- func (s *Scorer) Match(a, b string) bool
- func (s *Scorer) Threshold() float64
- func (s *Scorer) Algorithms() []ScorerAlgorithm
- func (s *Scorer) ScoreAll(a, b string) map[AlgoID]float64
- type ScorerAlgorithm struct
- type ScorerOption func(*scorerConfig) error
- func WithAlgorithm(algo AlgoID, weight float64) ScorerOption
- func WithoutAlgorithm(id AlgoID) ScorerOption
- func WithNormalisation(opts NormalisationOptions) ScorerOption
- func WithoutNormalisation() ScorerOption
- func WithThreshold(t float64) ScorerOption
- func WithNormaliseWeights(normalise bool) ScorerOption
- func WithQGramJaccardAlgorithm(weight float64, n int) ScorerOption
- func WithSorensenDiceAlgorithm(weight float64, n int) ScorerOption
- func WithCosineAlgorithm(weight float64, n int) ScorerOption
- func WithTverskyAlgorithm(weight, alpha, beta float64, n int) ScorerOption
- func WithMongeElkanAlgorithm(weight float64, inner AlgoID) ScorerOption
- func WithSmithWatermanGotohAlgorithm(weight float64, params SWGParams) ScorerOption

### Sentinel errors

- var ErrInvalidAlgoID error
- var ErrInvalidInnerAlgo error
- var ErrInvalidQGramSize error
- var ErrInvalidTverskyParam error
- var ErrEmptyScorer error
- var ErrInvalidWeight error
- var ErrInvalidThreshold error
- var ErrMissingThreshold error
- var ErrInternalInvariantViolated error
- var ErrInvalidSWGParam error

### Input validation and diagnostics

Consumer-facing diagnostic surface: Validate inspects a pair of inputs
and returns Warnings describing problematic-but-non-fatal input shapes.
Pure function; safe for concurrent use; never panics; returns nil if
no warnings apply. See docs/requirements.md §11.5 for the per-WarnKind
rule semantics. The companion AlgoIDAny sentinel scopes cross-cutting
Warnings that affect every algorithm in the catalogue.

- func Validate(a, b string) []Warning
- type Warning struct
- type WarnKind int
- func (WarnKind) String() string
- func WarnKinds() []WarnKind
- const WarnEmptyInput WarnKind
- const WarnUnequalLength WarnKind
- const WarnNoTokensAfterNormalise WarnKind
- const WarnAllNonASCIIDropped WarnKind
- const WarnPathologicallyLargeInput WarnKind
- const AlgoIDAny AlgoID

## Out of v1.0 scope

- Needleman-Wunsch (superseded by Smith-Waterman-Gotoh's local
  alignment).
- Soft-TFIDF (out of scope; no domain corpus dependency wanted).
- Metaphone 3 (U.S. Patent 7,440,941 — declined for licence hygiene).
- ML / embeddings (out of scope for a pure-function library).
- Goroutine-parallel scan (Phase 9 may revisit; not in v1.0).
- Persistent caching (not a library concern).

## Documentation

- README.md — project front door
- docs/algorithms.md — per-algorithm detail (23 sections)
- docs/scorer.md — Scorer composition (Phase 8)
- docs/scan.md — collection scan (Phase 9)
- docs/extending.md — custom algorithms
- docs/tuning.md — threshold calibration
- docs/performance.md — benchmark numbers
- docs/faq.md — common questions and exclusions
- docs/requirements.md — authoritative spec
- llms-full.txt — full API reference with per-symbol signatures and
  per-algorithm primary-source citations

## For agents

- .claude/agents/ — domain review gates
- .claude/skills/ — reusable standards
- CLAUDE.md — project conventions
